---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for devterm
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the pain point. E.g., "I always have to manually install X after running devterm..."

## Proposed solution
What would you like devterm to do?

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, or examples that help explain your idea.
